name: Zuchinni Squash Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil zuchinni slices in a small amount of water for 6 minutes. Drain.
2. While the squash is cooking, brown the ground meat and drain off any fat.
3. Combine the browned meat with the remaining ingredients: onion soup (or onion), salt, pepper, oregano, cheddar cheese (grated), and cracker crumbs.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
5. Add the cooked squash to the mixture and stir everything together.
6. Pour the contents into a greased 2-quart casserole or two 1-quart casseroles.
7. Optionally, you can use onion soup instead of onion if more liquid is needed, especially with particularly dry squashes. You may also substitute celery soup or chicken soup for additional flavor without adding extra water.
